fortress.name: Rasnov Fortress Gate
fortress.fact: The fortress was built in 1215 by Teutonic Knights to protect against Mongol invasions.
fortress.hint: Next, discover the legendary source of water that saved the fortress during sieges - the Ancient Well!

well.name: Ancient Well
well.fact: This 143-meter deep well was dug by Turkish prisoners and took 17 years to complete.
well.hint: Now climb high to the Watch Tower where guards kept lookout for approaching enemies!

quiz.question: What caused the cave to be discovered?

tower.name: Watch Tower
tower.fact: The watch tower provided 360-degree views to spot approaching enemies from miles away.
tower.hint: Seek the Old Church where villagers found sanctuary and spiritual guidance for centuries!

quiz.question: What was Schleif used for in the Middle Ages?
quiz.answer: A popular play area for children
options: A popular play area for children

church.name: Old Church
church.fact: This Gothic church dates back to the 14th century and still holds services today.
church.hint: Journey to the Village Museum to explore authentic Romanian traditions and artifacts!

quiz.question: The Schubz Center is a part of what group?

museum.name: Village Museum
museum.fact: The museum houses over 300 artifacts showcasing traditional Romanian village life.
museum.hint: Adventure awaits at the Mountain Peak - breathtaking views from 1650m elevation!

quiz.question: When was the first Film and History Festival?

peak.name: Mountain Peak
peak.fact: At 1650m elevation, this peak offers views of the entire Barsa region on clear days.
peak.hint: Head down to the historic Town Square where markets and festivals have thrived for 600 years!

square.name: Town Square
square.fact: The town square has been a gathering place for markets and festivals for over 600 years.
square.hint: One more adventure awaits - visit the amazing Dino Park with life-size dinosaur replicas!

dino.name: Dino Park Entrance
dino.fact: Dino Park features over 100 life-size dinosaur replicas in their natural habitat settings.
dino.fact_ro: Dino Parc are peste 100 de replici de dinozauri la scară naturală în habitat similar.
dino.hint: Congratulations! You've completed the entire Rasnov treasure hunt!
dino.hint_ro: Felicitări! Ai terminat întreaga vânătoare în Râșnov!
